plugins.name: wshot
plugins.description: Screenshot tool for Wayland/GNOME - capture windows by app name, PID, title, or window ID

plugins.name: scholar-search
plugins.description: Academic reference tools - find papers via Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, and arXiv, get high-quality BibTeX from DBLP

plugins.name: paper-siphon
plugins.description: Convert academic PDFs to clean Markdown - handles local files and URLs, with VLM support for complex layouts

plugins.name: codex-exec
plugins.description: Delegate code review, plan review, and deep exploration tasks to Codex CLI from Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-exec
plugins.description: Delegate code review, plan review, and deep exploration tasks to Claude Code CLI from Codex or other agents

plugins.name: review-anvil
plugins.description: Iterative multi-agent review-and-fix loop. Dispatch N rounds of parallel codex-exec/claude-exec reviewers, synthesize findings, optionally apply fixes with logically-separated commits or run review-only. Ships /review-anvil, /review-anvil-review, and /review-anvil-pr slash commands.

plugins.name: overleaf-comment
plugins.description: Bulk-post Overleaf comments from a JSON plan via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Uses the chrome-cdp skill to drive an existing logged-in browser tab.

plugins.name: overleaf-compile
plugins.description: Recompile an Overleaf project and extract its build logs/errors/warnings in a standardized format via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Uses the chrome-cdp skill to drive an existing logged-in browser tab.

plugins.name: gdocs-comment
plugins.description: Bulk-post anchored Google Docs comments (with @-mentions) from a JSON plan via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Uses the chrome-cdp skill to drive an existing logged-in browser tab.
